final:
module top_module(
    input A,
    input B,
    input C,
    input D,
    input S0,
    input S1,
    output Y
);assign Y = (~S1 & ~S0 & A) | (~S1 & S0 & B) | (S1 & ~S0 & C) | (S1 & S0 & D);

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Y <= A; if (S0 && !S1) Y <= B; if (!S0 && S1) Y <= C; if (S0 && S1) Y <= D;
    end
  end

endmodule
